title: Model thinking included in response from Ollama
symptom: After updating to n8n 1.123.5 and ollama 0.13.2, the output includes model thinking without a separator, making it difficult to parse.
not_this_if: Using an older version of ollama or n8n
root_cause: The integration between n8n and the Ollama chat model changed in the recent updates, causing the output to combine model thinking and responses without proper separation, leading to confusion in the output format.
fix_steps: Test the workflow again to ensure the output is correctly formatted
agent_instruction: Upgrade to @langchain/ollama@1.0.3 to resolve the output formatting issue.
